motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:

```python
class Solution:
    def largestMerge(self, word1: str, word2: str) -> str:
        merge = ""
        i = min(len(word1), len(word2))
        while i >= 0:
            if word1[i] < word2[i]:
                merge += word1[i]
                word1 = word1[:i] + word1[i+1:]
            else:
                merge += word2[i]
                word2 = word2[:i] + word2[i+1:]
            i -= 1
        return merge

```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(min(len(word1), len(word2))
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
